name: Jagged Alliance 2 Gold
short_description: The small country of Arulco has been taken over by a merciless dictator - and only you can loosen the iron grip! Jagged Alliance 2 Gold Pack immerses you into an elaborate role-playing universe where you will interact with more than 150 characters, recruit your own band of soldiers and create your own custom mercenary to win...
detailed_description:
The small country of Arulco has been taken over by a merciless dictator - and only you can loosen the iron grip! Jagged Alliance 2 Gold Pack immerses you into an elaborate role-playing universe where you will interact with more than 150 characters, recruit your own band of soldiers and create your own custom mercenary to win back Arulco - not once, but twice! The perfect blend of strategy, role playing and tactical combat!

Jagged Alliance 2: Gold includes the original Jagged Alliance 2 and the Unfinished Business Expansion Pack!

Jagged Alliance 2: Gold includes the original Jagged Alliance 2 and the Unfinished Business Expansion Pack!
